description: You are a UX Research Lead at a regional airline. Create a multi-page Customer Journey Map for an airline passenger experience based on the requirements in ~/Desktop/passenger_journey_requirements.txt. The diagram must include a first page named 'Journey Map' using a grid or swimlane structure with 6 vertical phases (Research & Booking, Pre-Departure, Airport Departure, In-Flight, Arrival, Post-Trip) and 6 horizontal lanes (Touchpoints, Channels, Actions, Emotions, Pain Points, Opportunities), populated with the content and flow indicators from the requirements file. A second page named 'Key Metrics' must include the Top 5 Pain Points and 3 'Moments of Truth' from the requirements. Save the diagram to ~/Desktop/passenger_journey_map.drawio and export the 'Journey Map' page to ~/Desktop/passenger_journey_map.png.
